subject: [w15] Conduct full profile interview with user
body: The user-profile-builder skill is ready. Run it in a new session to conduct the life inventory interview (invoke do-stuff-helper:user-profile-builder). The interview covers twelve life areas and can be spread across multiple sessions.
context: All agent tasks for w15 are complete: interview guide distilled from 8760 Hours, SKILL.md created, discover skill updated with profile check. The only remaining step is the actual interview, which requires the user's participation.
